title: 01047_VideoJAM_Joint_Appearance-Motion_Representations_for_Enhanced_Motion_Generation_in_Video_Models
positive_examples: Advances motion modeling in video generation, empowering models to understand and represent the world more faithfully.
negative_examples: Potential for misuse in content generation, a concern widely discussed within the research community.
Does not introduce any specific risks that were not already present in previous advancements.
